editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 8, 2026: Global Headlines, Markets, Hacker News, Product Hunt
editionData.description: A daily brief for May 8, 2026 covering global headlines, market closes, Hacker News, and Product Hunt.
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Exchange Fire Amid a Declared Truce
headlines.summary: The U.S. military said it struck Iranian military targets after, it said, Iran fired on U.S. warships in the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump threatened more if Iran didn’t agree to a peace offer.

headlines.title: German Leaders Clash With Spy Chiefs Over Domestic Threat From Iran
headlines.summary: Intelligence agents have privately warned of the potential of hybrid attacks from Iran-linked groups. But political leaders, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, have publicly played down the risk.

headlines.title: Starmer Braces for Local Election Losses Amid New Era of UK Politics
headlines.summary: Polls predict historic losses for Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s Labour Party on Thursday as anti-immigrant Reform U.K. makes gains, and a new era of multiparty politics takes shape.

headlines.title: In Hungary, Voters Exposed the Limits of China’s Ties to Orban
headlines.summary: Beijing depended on Hungary’s outgoing leader, Viktor Orban, to gain a toehold in Europe. A giant battery factory proved a step too far.

headlines.title: Israel Says It Killed a Hezbollah Chief Near Beirut, Testing the Truce
headlines.summary: The strike was the first near the Lebanese capital since a cease-fire that has curbed fighting but not halted it. Washington is pushing for a lasting peace, hoping it will ease diplomacy with Iran.

headlines.title: As US and Iran weigh peace deal, stranded seafarers wait in limbo
Trump says ceasefire still ‘in effect’ as Iran, US clash in Hormuz Strait
Tennessee approves new congressional map in latest redistricting flurry
Iran says it attacked US Navy ships after they targeted Iranian tanker
Senators press US military on Israel’s displacement campaign in Lebanon
Trade court strikes down a second round of Trump tariffs
headlines.summary: The Court of International Trade has struck down a second round of global tariffs ordered by President Trump, after his earlier import taxes were outlawed by the U.S. Supreme Court.

headlines.title: U.S. military says it intercepted Iranian attacks on 3 Navy ships in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: The U.S. military also says that it "targeted Iranian military facilities responsible for attacking U.S. forces." The exchange occurred Thursday as U.S. Navy destroyers transited the Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Central Command said in a social media post.

headlines.title: Is hantavirus the next COVID? Is the U.S. response on point? An outbreak update
headlines.summary: The outbreak began in early April on a cruise ship. Now health authorities around the world are working to contain it. Here's what infectious disease experts have to say.

headlines.title: She helps families in need. As gas and grocery prices rise, she needs help, too
headlines.summary: She has spent decades helping others struggling to make ends meet. Now the rising cost of gas and groceries has left Dalene Basden feeling the strain herself.

headlines.title: With legal briefs in, Supreme Court weighs telehealth access for the abortion pill
headlines.summary: After an appeals court tried to end telemedicine access to mifepristone, one of the two pills used in a medication abortion, the Supreme Court stepped in. Here's what's happened and what's to come.

headlines.title: Chinese brands 'display' tech at expo
headlines.summary: Major Chinese brands showcased a broad range of new products and next-generation applications at Display Week 2026 hosted by the Society for Information Display in Los Angeles, highlighting continued investment in innovation, research and development, and global industrial cooperation amid evolving global trade conditions.

headlines.title: European airlines face crisis as fuel prices soar amid conflict
headlines.summary: FRANKFURT — The European aviation sector is facing its most severe crisis since the 2020 pandemic, as the ongoing Middle East conflicts have pushed jet fuel prices to multiyear highs and forced major carriers to overhaul their strategies.

headlines.title: AI risks loom over Musk-OpenAI trial
headlines.summary: OAKLAND — Concerns over the risks posed by artificial intelligence have loomed large over a US trial pitting Elon Musk against OpenAI chief executive Sam Altman, even as the court focuses on a business dispute rather than the technology itself.

headlines.title: 29 passengers got off ship after 1st hantavirus fatality
headlines.summary: THE HAGUE — More than two dozen passengers left a cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak on April 24 without contact tracing, nearly two weeks after the first passenger died on board, the ship operator and Dutch officials said on Thursday.

headlines.title: Japan's missile launch shatters pacifist stance
headlines.summary: Japan has, for the first time since World War II, fired offensive missiles on foreign soil, a move that experts say has effectively gutted the country's pacifist constitution and marks a critical escalation in its accelerating remilitarization, posing threats to regional stability.

headlines.title: Governor’s remit is to invite TVK chief Vijay and ask for a floor test: former Law Minister Ashwani Kumar
headlines.summary: Former Law Minister Ashwani Kumar urges Tamil Nadu Governor to invite Vijay for a floor test to honor the popular mandate.

headlines.title: Despite outreach by India, Pakistan hasn’t been isolated, says Congress
headlines.summary: Congress criticizes India's diplomatic efforts, claiming Pakistan remains unisolated, highlighting U.S. embrace of Army Chief Asim Munir.

headlines.title: India will shape the battlefield if challenged again: armed forces on Operation Sindoor
headlines.summary: Operation Sindoor marks a decisive shift in India's strategy against terrorism, ensuring no sanctuary in Pakistan is safe.

headlines.title: Supreme Court asks if there was a 'proper debate' in Parliament before enacting CEC/EC appointments law
headlines.summary: Supreme Court questions the adequacy of parliamentary debate on the new law governing Election Commission appointments amid Opposition suspensions.

headlines.title: Maharashtra Dy CM Eknath Shinde unhurt after mid-air scare aboard helicopter
headlines.summary: Maharashtra Dy CM Eknath Shinde safely returns to Mumbai after mid-air scare caused by an approaching storm during his flight.

headlines.title: Exclusive: SK Hynix flooded with unprecedented offers from big tech firms to secure chip supplies
US military says it carries out retaliatory strikes against Iran
Iran accuses US of violating ceasefire with new attacks
US trade court rules Trump tariffs illegal, but issues narrow block
Explosion hits Netherlands' largest political party's headquarters, police say
